name: property-value-broker-contradicts-appraisal
rationale: Broker asserts property_value $850,000 in intake. Appraisal doc shows $720,000 (18% lower). Broker did not 'correct' the appraisal — they're directly contradicting it. F1.PV canonical-map captures both with broker_initial_intent vs docs-tier classifications; F2.DH discrepancyHold may activate if discrepancy exceeds threshold. Tests how Vienna resolves broker-vs-doc contradiction at the intake step (BW=CT, not BW=CR — broker isn't correcting, they're asserting alongside docs).
notes: Single-event sequence. BW=CT (contradict) distinct from BW=CR (correct): contradict is intake-time disagreement; correct is post-intake update.
